sections.paragraph:
Original: נכח

Transliteration: nôkach

Phonetic: no'-kakh

BDB Definition:

  1. be in front of
  2. in front of, opposite to, in the sight of, before, to the front, right on
  3. towards the front of, in front of, on behalf of, as far as in front of

Origin: from the same as H5226

TWOT entry: 1365a

Part(s) of speech:
